content.full_text:
JOHN SANDS  
665 Quincy Way  
Hayward, CA 94541

July 18, 1990

Fair Political Practices Commission  
P.O. Box 807  
Sacramento, CA 95804

Dear Commissioners,

Since Proposition 73 changed many regulations affecting political committees, I'm writing to request an FPPC opinion regarding the status of a committee which was organized in 1988.

The United Democratic Headquarters Committee (ID#881656) was organized to do voter registration and help those candidates who were on the Democratic ticket in the 1988 general election. Contributions to this committee came mainly from local state legislators and local democratic clubs. We have some surplus money left in the account.

This year, we are planning to do the same type of activities. Therefore, we are asking if we can continue to use this committee and the funds that already exist.

Your attention to this request is greatly appreciated.

JOHN SANDS  
Treasurer  
United Democratic Headquarters Committee
